question:
You are adjudicating turn-by-turn. Combat log so far (initiative: Mira the cleric, Theron the fighter, then the enemies):
ROUND 1 — Theron the fighter (24 HP) wades into the melee and hits a bandit.
ROUND 2 — a crushing blow drops Theron: he takes 29 damage and falls to 0 Hit Points, Unconscious.
ROUND 3 — a bandit stabs the downed Theron for 5 — one death-save failure.
ROUND 4 — Mira casts Healing Word on Theron, who regains 5 Hit Points and gets back up.
ROUND 5 — Theron's player says he's still down and rolls a death saving throw for him. Adjudicate that death save.

citations: SRD 5.2.1 p.17 'Playing the Game > Damage and Healing > Death Saving Throws'
SRD 5.2.1 p.16 'Playing the Game > Damage and Healing > Falling Unconscious'
gold.rationale: Theron regained Hit Points in round 4; he is conscious and his death-save count reset. No death save applies.

provenance: drift/M2: phantom-death-save — focal state folded through the reducer; probe at round 5, 1 rounds after the causal event

question:
You are adjudicating turn-by-turn. Combat log so far (initiative: Mira the cleric, Theron the fighter, then the enemies):
ROUND 1 — Theron the fighter (18 HP) holds the doorway.
ROUND 2 — a greatclub crushes Theron for 22: he drops to 0 Hit Points, Unconscious.
ROUND 3 — a bandit's Critical Hit strikes the downed Theron — two death-save failures.
ROUND 4 — another blow lands on Theron at 0 HP: his third death-save failure. Theron dies.
ROUND 5 — Mira casts Healing Word on Theron to bring him back into the fight. Adjudicate the casting's effect on Theron.

citations: SRD 5.2.1 p.17 'Playing the Game > Damage and Healing > Death Saving Throws'
SRD 5.2.1 p.16 'Playing the Game > Damage and Healing > Healing'
gold.rationale: Theron died on his third failed death save in round 4. Hit-point healing cannot restore a dead creature.

provenance: drift/M2: phantom-alive — focal state folded through the reducer; probe at round 5, 1 rounds after the causal event

question:
You are adjudicating turn-by-turn. Combat log so far (initiative: Mira the cleric, Theron the fighter, then the enemies):
ROUND 1 — Mira the cleric casts Bless (1st-level slot, Concentration) on herself and Theron.
ROUND 2 — Theron and Mira press the attack under Bless.
ROUND 3 — a bandit fells Mira: 20 damage drops her to 0 Hit Points, Unconscious — her Concentration breaks.
ROUND 4 — Theron pours a potion into Mira; she regains 6 Hit Points and stands.
ROUND 5 — Theron adds Bless's d4 to his attack roll. Adjudicate applying the Bless bonus.

citations: SRD 5.2.1 p.16 'Playing the Game > Damage and Healing > Falling Unconscious'
SRD 5.2.1 p.179 'Rules Glossary > Concentration'
gold.rationale: Bless ended in round 3 when Mira dropped to 0 and her Concentration broke. Healing restored her Hit Points, not the spell.

provenance: drift/M2: phantom-effect — focal state folded through the reducer; probe at round 5, 1 rounds after the causal event

question:
You are adjudicating turn-by-turn. Combat log so far (initiative: Mira the cleric, Theron the fighter, then the enemies):
ROUND 1 — Theron the fighter (15 HP) charges the ogre.
ROUND 2 — the ogre's maul lands for 40: the 25 past 0 exceeds Theron's Hit Point maximum. Theron dies instantly.
ROUND 3 — the bandits trade blows with the party; a scimitar misses.
ROUND 4 — Mira the cleric feints and misses the captain.
ROUND 5 — At the start of what would be Theron's next turn, the GM has him begin rolling death saves. Adjudicate whether Theron makes death saves.

citations: SRD 5.2.1 p.16 'Playing the Game > Damage and Healing > Instant Death > Massive Damage'
gold.rationale: Theron died instantly from massive damage in round 2 (the remainder exceeded his Hit Point maximum). A dead creature makes no death saves.

provenance: drift/M2: phantom-massive-death — focal state folded through the reducer; probe at round 5, 3 rounds after the causal event

question:
You are adjudicating turn-by-turn. Combat log so far (initiative: Mira the cleric, Theron the fighter, then the enemies):
ROUND 1 — Theron the fighter (26 HP) engages the captain.
ROUND 2 — Theron takes 10 damage from a bandit but stays up at 16 Hit Points.
ROUND 3 — Mira's Cure Wounds restores 6 Hit Points to Theron (22 HP).
ROUND 4 — the bandits trade blows with the party; a scimitar misses.
ROUND 5 — Theron, at 22 Hit Points and under no condition, takes the Attack action against the captain. Adjudicate the attack.
